result.summary: Newegg has one public developer API (Marketplace REST) and one SDK/library surface, both using the same API Key + Secret Key credentials in `Authorization` and `SecretKey` headers; no GraphQL, MCP, or standalone CLI surface was found.

newegg_api_key.label: Newegg Marketplace API Key
newegg_api_key.setup: Request API access from the [Newegg Marketplace Seller Portal](https://sellerportal.newegg.com/manage-account/datafeedsettings). After approval, Newegg assigns an API key to your API account and sends it to you. If you are a third-party developer, complete partner registration via the Newegg Marketplace Integration Team and obtain a developer-level API key.
